introSection: Crazy Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned and travelled by UK showmen Thomas Wilmot & Sons.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Before being acquired by its current owners, Crazy Mouse toured Ireland under the ownership of showman Harry McFadden until early 2014. McFadden sold it to Wilmot's of Scotland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Pink track with yellow supports. This is the smaller Spinning Coaster from Reverchon.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned and travelled by UK showmen Thomas Wilmot & Sons.

Before being acquired by its current owners, Crazy Mouse toured Ireland under the ownership of showman Harry McFadden until early 2014. McFadden sold it to Wilmot's of Scotland.

Pink track with yellow supports. This is the smaller Spinning Coaster from Reverchon.
